race.comment: JOHNNY TIGHTLIPS (2) ran well on debut last start to finish second over 1100m at this track in a tougher race. Has plenty of upside so he will prove tough to beat. IMPACTICAL (1) returned from a spell two weeks ago when he was beaten 3.5 lengths into fourth over 1200m at Pakenham. Strips fitter and can take this out. SASSIDORA (9) was prominent from the outset and fought on for third last start over 1200m at Moe, making it three minor placings in a row. Has the pace to be thereabouts from the outset. Likely improver with strong prospects. TAGAMATE (4) made progress last start to finish second over 1225m at Kyneton. Suitably placed so he can feature again.
